phu_quoc.name: Phu Quoc
phu_quoc.tagline: Pearl Island at Vietnam's Tropical Southern Tip

attractions.name: Chợ Đêm Vui-Fest Bazaar Sunset Town
attractions.description: This night market blends local street vendors with Instagram-worthy sunset backdrops over Duong Dong's waterfront, creating an energetic blend of shopping and evening atmosphere. Come for the fresh seafood stalls and handcrafted souvenirs, stay for the golden hour photography opportunities among the crowds.
attractions.local_name: Chợ Đêm Vui-Fest Bazaar Sunset Town
attractions.tip: Arrive 30 minutes before sunset to secure prime photo spots near the water, then browse stalls as vendors light up their displays—prices often drop after 9pm if you're willing to negotiate.

attractions.name: Chợ đêm Vui Fest
attractions.description: This night market explodes with neon lights, live music, and vendors hawking everything from grilled seafood to handmade crafts across multiple themed zones. The electric atmosphere and Instagram-worthy backdrops make it Phu Quoc's premier evening hangout for locals and visitors alike.
attractions.tip: Arrive after 8 PM when the crowd peaks and food stalls hit their rhythm—prices drop on unsold items near closing time around midnight.

attractions.name: Chợ đêm Ẩm thực Phu Quoc Marina
attractions.description: This waterfront night market specializes in fresh seafood and local dishes, with stalls arranged along the marina where fishing boats dock daily. Come for authentic street food at fraction of restaurant prices, served by vendors who've perfected their recipes for decades.
attractions.local_name: Chợ đêm Ẩm thực Phu Quoc Marina
attractions.tip: Arrive after 7 PM when the market reaches full energy and food quality peaks. Bring cash—most vendors don't accept cards, and haggling is expected for non-food items.

attractions.name: Lemon Queen
attractions.description: This vibrant night market stall specializes in fresh lemon drinks and tropical beverages, blending Vietnamese citrus traditions with modern presentation. It's the perfect pit stop for refreshing, Instagram-worthy drinks while exploring Duong Dong's bustling evening market scene.
attractions.tip: Order the lemon with salt and ice early evening before the crowds peak; the fresh stock runs out quickly after 9 PM.

attractions.name: Sunset Town
attractions.description: Sunset Town features colorful colonial-style buildings and waterfront promenades where golden hour light transforms the architecture into Instagram gold. Come here to experience Phu Quoc's most photogenic evening atmosphere with local seafood dining and artisan shops.
attractions.tip: Arrive 90 minutes before sunset and explore the quieter side streets first—the main promenade gets crowded quickly as golden hour approaches.

attractions.name: Walking Street Long Beach Phu Quoc
attractions.description: This waterfront promenade buzzes with local vendors, fresh seafood stalls, and neon signs reflecting off the dark water after sunset. Come for the authentic street food scene and Instagram-worthy night market atmosphere where Phu Quoc residents actually gather.
attractions.local_name: Đường Đi Bộ Long Beach Phú Quốc
attractions.tip: Arrive around 6 PM before the crowds peak; vendors offer better deals and you'll snag prime seating at seafood spots before tables fill up.

attractions.name: Kiss of the Sea show - Nụ hôn của Biển Cả
attractions.description: This dynamic water theater production combines acrobatics, live music, and pyrotechnics against Phu Quoc's coastline, creating an immersive maritime spectacle. The show delivers pure entertainment with impressive choreography and technical effects that capture the island's romantic essence.
attractions.tip: Arrive 20 minutes early to secure optimal seating on the left side, which offers the best angle for the main stage action and sunset backdrop.

attractions.name: Đảo Thiên Đường - Hòn Thơm Paradise Island
attractions.description: Crystal-clear waters frame pristine white-sand beaches dotted with swaying palms and vibrant coral gardens visible from the shore. The island's cable car ride offers sweeping ocean vistas while snorkeling reveals colorful marine life just meters from the beach.
attractions.local_name: Đảo Thiên Đường - Hòn Thơm Paradise Island
attractions.tip: Visit on weekday mornings before tour groups arrive; the cable car has shorter queues and water visibility peaks in late morning light.

attractions.name: Hon Thom Departure Terminal - Sun World Hon Thom Nature Park
attractions.description: Mountain cable car station & shopping hub modelled on Ancient Rome & linked to an island water park.

attractions.name: InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort by IHG
attractions.description: Chic rooms & suites in a premium beachfront resort offering dining, pools & a hip rooftop bar.

attractions.name: Hộ Quốc Temple
attractions.description: Perched on a forested hillside, this active Buddhist temple features intricate golden statues and panoramic views overlooking Phú Quốc's coastline. The peaceful sanctuary offers genuine spiritual atmosphere away from beach crowds, making it ideal for cultural immersion and quiet reflection.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning around 6-7am to see monks performing rituals and enjoy cooler temperatures with minimal tourists on the winding uphill path.

attractions.name: Bãi biển Thị trấn Hoàng Hôn
attractions.description: Golden-hour light transforms this western-facing beach into a photographer's paradise, with pastel skies reflecting off calm waters and silhouetted palms. Come for sunset magic that justifies the Instagram hype without needing filters.
attractions.local_name: Bãi biển Thị trấn Hoàng Hôn
attractions.tip: Arrive 90 minutes before sunset and position yourself near the rocky outcrops on the southern end for dramatically framed shots and fewer crowds.

attractions.name: Sonasea Public Beach Bai Truong
attractions.description: Golden sand stretches for kilometers along Phu Quoc's longest beach, backed by swaying palms and calm turquoise waters perfect for swimming. Visit during sunrise or sunset when soft light transforms the shoreline into a photographer's paradise.
attractions.local_name: Bãi Biển Công Cộng Sonasea Bãi Trường
attractions.tip: Arrive before 9am to avoid crowds and secure prime spots near the water; local vendors set up by mid-morning with fresh seafood grills.

attractions.name: Kiss Bridge
attractions.description: This wooden pedestrian bridge stretches over emerald waters, connecting two rocky outcrops with a gentle arch that frames perfect sunset views. It's become Phu Quoc's most romantic photo spot, ideal for couples seeking intimate moments away from crowded beaches.
attractions.tip: Visit during late afternoon golden hour before sunset crowds arrive, and bring a sarong to change into for photos—the shallow waters below are swimmable.

attractions.name: Ice Jungle
attractions.description: This indoor ice park features elaborate frozen sculptures and themed ice rooms carved with intricate details, maintaining subzero temperatures year-round. It's the perfect escape from Phu Quoc's tropical heat and offers interactive photo opportunities across imaginative ice installations.
attractions.tip: Go early morning or late afternoon to avoid crowds and enjoy clearer photos when the ice sculptures catch better light.

attractions.name: Quảng trường dạo bộ
attractions.description: This waterfront promenade offers panoramic views of An Thoi's fishing harbor and southern coastline, with local vendors and fresh seafood stalls lining the walkway. Perfect for evening strolls when fishermen return with their catch and the sky ignites with golden light.
attractions.tip: Visit around 4-5 PM to watch fishing boats return to harbor while avoiding the midday heat—locals gather here at dusk, not dawn.

attractions.name: Phu Quoc Prison History Museum
attractions.description: French colonial prison used for Vietnam War POWs, with mannequins demonstrating gruesome torture.

attractions.name: Phu Quoc Prison Martyrs' Monument
attractions.description: This solemn monument honors Vietnamese prisoners who died during French colonial rule, featuring striking stone sculptures and plaques documenting their sacrifices. The site offers meaningful historical insight and serves as a reflective destination for understanding Vietnam's struggle for independence.
attractions.local_name: Tượng đài Liệt sĩ Nhà tù Phú Quốc
attractions.tip: Visit early morning before tour groups arrive to experience the peaceful atmosphere and capture better photographs of the monument's intricate details without crowds.

attractions.name: Temple
attractions.description: This hilltop temple commands sweeping views over An Thoi's fishing villages and turquoise waters, its golden spires catching afternoon light magnificently. The peaceful sanctuary offers respite from beach crowds while rewarding visitors with Instagram-worthy perspectives of southern Phu Quoc's coastline.
attractions.tip: Visit late afternoon when golden hour light hits the temple spires—locals know this timing produces the best photographs without midday glare and crowds.

attractions.name: Cột Đá Cổ Pompeii - Ancient Pompeii
attractions.description: Ancient stone columns rising dramatically from Phu Quoc's southern coastline create an otherworldly archaeological landscape that rivals Mediterranean ruins. Walk among these weathered pillars at sunset when golden light transforms them into Instagram gold while learning about the island's mysterious colonial past.
attractions.tip: Visit during early morning low tide to access hidden cave chambers beneath the main columns—most tourists miss this entirely.

attractions.name: Sea Walker - Đi bộ đáy biển
attractions.description: Walk along the seafloor in a specialized helmet, breathing normally while observing coral gardens and tropical fish at Sao Beach's shallow waters. This unique underwater experience requires no diving certification and offers an accessible way to explore Phu Quoc's marine ecosystem.
attractions.local_name: Sea Walker - Đi bộ đáy biển
attractions.tip: Go early morning when water clarity is best and marine life is most active. Wear water shoes with good grip for the sandy bottom.

attractions.name: Tháp Bút Chì
attractions.description: This distinctive pencil-shaped tower rises dramatically from Phu Quoc's southern coastline, offering unobstructed views across An Thoi archipelago and the Cambodian coast. The location rewards early risers with golden hour light that transforms the tower into a perfect photographic subject against the sea.
attractions.tip: Arrive just before sunset and stay 30 minutes after for the best light. The path gets crowded mid-afternoon, so timing is everything for solo shots.

attractions.name: Công Viên San Hô Namaste Phú Quốc Hòn Rỏi
attractions.description: This coral park features vibrant reef ecosystems visible through glass-bottom boats and shallow snorkeling areas along Phú Quốc's southern coast. Visit to swim above thriving coral gardens and encounter tropical fish species in their natural habitat.
attractions.local_name: Công Viên San Hô Namaste Phú Quốc Hòn Rỏi
attractions.tip: Arrive early morning before tour groups; the water clarity and fish activity peak between 7-9am before afternoon boat traffic stirs the seabed.

attractions.name: Aquatopia Water Park
attractions.description: This water park features colorful slides, wave pools, and lazy rivers set against Phu Quoc's tropical backdrop. It's the island's best option for a full day of water-based fun, especially appealing for families seeking relief from the heat.
attractions.tip: Visit on weekdays to avoid weekend crowds from Ho Chi Minh City tourists. Arrive early morning when water temperature is most comfortable and lines shortest.

attractions.name: Quốc Mẫu Hall
attractions.description: This temple honors the Mother Goddess through intricate wooden carvings and traditional Vietnamese spiritual architecture nestled near Phu Quoc's northern forests. Visit to experience authentic local religious practices and understand the deeply rooted cultural beliefs of Vietnamese communities.
attractions.tip: Arrive early morning when local worshippers visit for quieter exploration and better natural lighting for photography through the wooden lattice windows.

attractions.name: PHU QUOC CENTRE
attractions.description: This modern shopping complex anchors Duong Dong's retail scene with air-conditioned boutiques, electronics stores, and local vendors under one roof. Visit for convenient souvenir shopping and people-watching while escaping the tropical heat.
attractions.tip: Shop here in late afternoon when locals browse after work—you'll catch better deals and authentic interactions than morning tourist crowds.

attractions.name: Dinh Cậu
attractions.description: Small shrine to the goddess of the sea, with a blue-&-white striped lighthouse & harbor views.

attractions.name: Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phu Quoc
attractions.description: This beachfront resort pairs private villa stays with a full-service spa overlooking the turquoise waters of Long Beach. Come for the perfectly composed photo moments and stay for the seamless blend of luxury relaxation with accessible coastal charm.
attractions.local_name: Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phú Quốc
attractions.tip: Visit the spa during sunset hour for golden-hour photos reflected in the treatment room windows—locals book evening slots specifically for this Instagram advantage.

attractions.name: Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant
attractions.description: Watch the sun dip into the Gulf of Thailand while sipping cocktails at this beachfront venue on Phu Quoc's western shore. The golden hour views paired with fresh seafood and relaxed atmosphere make it the perfect evening escape.
attractions.tip: Arrive 30 minutes before sunset and order from the happy hour menu—prices drop significantly and you'll secure the best vantage point before crowds arrive.

attractions.name: OCSEN Beach Bar & Club
attractions.description: This beachfront venue combines relaxed daytime lounging with vibrant evening entertainment, offering craft cocktails and fresh seafood against Long Beach's golden sunset backdrop. The DJ sets and poolside atmosphere make it the go-to spot for sunset drinks and late-night dancing on Phu Quoc.
attractions.tip: Arrive by 5 PM to secure a prime beachfront table before the sunset crowd; happy hour prices run until 7 PM with 50% off select drinks.

attractions.name: Dinh Bà Thủy Long Thánh Mẫu
attractions.description: This centuries-old temple dedicated to the Goddess of the Sea sits gracefully overlooking Long Beach, blending ornate Vietnamese architecture with spiritual reverence. Local worshippers and visitors come to experience authentic religious customs and capture the temple's intricate details against coastal backdrops.
attractions.local_name: Đình Bà Thuỷ Long Thánh Mẫu
attractions.tip: Arrive early morning before tour groups to see locals performing rituals and prayers—the atmosphere is most genuine between 6-8am.

attractions.name: Phu Quoc Beach
attractions.description: Golden sand stretches between emerald waters and swaying palms, with shallow sections perfect for swimming. Visit for pristine coastal beauty and excellent photo opportunities without the crowds of northern Vietnamese beaches.
attractions.tip: Arrive early morning before 8am to secure parking and enjoy the beach before tour groups arrive from resorts.

attractions.name: Chợ đêm Phú Quốc
attractions.description: This bustling night market in Duong Dong pulses with energy as vendors hawk fresh seafood, grilled meats, and tropical fruits under glowing lanterns and string lights. Come here to experience authentic local life where Phu Quoc residents gather to eat, shop, and socialize after sunset.
attractions.tip: Arrive after 7 PM when the market is fully alive and food stalls have just opened—prices are freshest and crowds are manageable before the late-night rush.

attractions.name: Bach Dang Night Market
attractions.description: Grilled seafood stalls and street vendors pack this lively night market where fresh catches from the day are cooked right before you. Come for authentic Phu Quoc flavors at local prices, away from touristy restaurants.
attractions.tip: Arrive after 7 PM when vendors are fully set up and locals fill the stalls—the best grilled fish and squid sell out by 9 PM.

attractions.name: Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc
attractions.description: This bustling night market in Duong Dong overflows with fresh seafood, local handicrafts, and street food stalls lit by colorful lanterns. Come for authentic island flavors and genuine interactions with Phu Quoc locals away from tourist areas.
attractions.tip: Arrive after 6 PM when fishing boats unload the day's catch—prices drop and the market energy peaks with locals hunting dinner bargains.

attractions.name: PHU QUOC NIGHT MARKET & LOCAL FOOD
attractions.description: Duong Dong's night market buzzes with vendors grilling squid, prawns, and fish over charcoal while locals haggle over fresh catches and tropical fruits under flickering lights. The best reason to visit is sampling authentic Phu Quoc specialties like pepper crab and fish sauce directly from vendors at fraction of restaurant prices.
attractions.local_name: Chợ Đêm Phú Quốc & Ẩm Thực Địa Phương
attractions.tip: Arrive after 7 PM when fishermen return with the day's catch; prices drop significantly in the final hour before closing around 11 PM.

attractions.name: Cao Dai Temple of Phu-Quoc
attractions.description: This ornate temple showcases Cao Dai's unique blend of Eastern and Western spiritual symbolism, with its distinctive pastel architecture and intricate decorative details. Visit to witness authentic religious ceremonies and understand Vietnam's fascinating syncretic faith tradition.
attractions.local_name: Nhà Thờ Cao Đài Phú Quốc
attractions.tip: Arrive during morning prayer sessions (around 6-7am) when locals gather in full ceremonial dress for the most authentic and photogenic experience.

attractions.name: Bãi Trường
attractions.description: A 20km stretch of pristine sand backed by swaying palms creates natural Instagram frames at every turn. The calm, clear waters and uncrowded atmosphere make it perfect for swimming and sunset watching without the chaos of busier beaches.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning around 6-7am to photograph the golden light without crowds, then return at dusk when local fishermen bring in their boats—excellent photo opportunities.

attractions.name: Sunset Sanato Beach Club
attractions.description: This beachfront venue transforms as the sun dips below the horizon, casting golden light across Phu Quoc's pristine shoreline while live music drifts across the sand. Come here to experience sunset cocktails paired with fresh seafood, where the Long Beach cluster's best golden-hour views meet casual island sophistication.
attractions.tip: Arrive 90 minutes before sunset and order the house-made passion fruit mojito—it pairs perfectly with the light show and avoids the peak crowd rush.

attractions.name: Chuồn Chuồn Bistro & Bar
attractions.description: This riverside bistro captures Phu Quoc's laid-back charm with craft cocktails and Vietnamese fusion cuisine served in a photogenic colonial-style setting. Perfect for sunset drinks where you can watch longtail boats drift past while enjoying fresh seafood and creative cocktails.
attractions.tip: Order their signature dragonfly-inspired cocktails during golden hour—the lighting transforms the interior into an Instagram paradise, and the bartenders share stories about the venue's local history.

attractions.name: Dusit Princess Moonrise beach resort
attractions.description: This beachfront resort features a dramatic infinity pool perched above pristine white-sand shores with limestone cliffs framing the horizon. The property's modern architecture and sunset views over Long Beach make it ideal for those seeking luxury coastal relaxation.
attractions.local_name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Dusit Princess Moonrise Beach
attractions.tip: Visit during late afternoon to catch golden hour light reflecting off the pool—perfect for photography without the midday heat and crowds.

attractions.name: Su Muon Pagoda
attractions.description: This hilltop pagoda commands sweeping views across Phu Quoc's coastline and surrounding jungle, with golden spires catching afternoon light beautifully. Visit for serene spiritual atmosphere and panoramic island vistas that reward the climb with unforgettable photography opportunities.
attractions.tip: Arrive in late afternoon when tour buses leave and golden hour light illuminates the pagoda—locals often visit then for quieter worship and better photos.

attractions.name: Coi Nguon Museum
attractions.description: This museum showcases traditional fishing equipment and artifacts from Phu Quoc's maritime heritage, offering intimate glimpses into generations of local pearl farming and seafaring culture. Visit to understand the island's soul through the eyes of families who've harvested these waters for centuries.
attractions.tip: Arrive early morning when local guides are most available and less crowded; they share stories about specific fishing techniques that displays alone won't reveal.

attractions.name: Long Beach Mart
attractions.description: This beachfront shopping complex combines local crafts, souvenirs, and fresh seafood stalls with direct ocean views along Phu Quoc's sandy shore. It's the perfect spot to hunt for authentic Vietnamese handicrafts and sample fresh catches while watching the sunset.
attractions.tip: Visit in late afternoon when local fishermen return with their catch and vendors offer the freshest seafood at better prices than evening.

attractions.name: THE PEAK PHU QUOC
attractions.description: This elevated viewpoint offers panoramic vistas of Phu Quoc's emerald waters, forested hills, and distant islands stretching to the horizon. Come at sunset to watch golden light flood across the landscape while enjoying cooler temperatures and optimal photography conditions.
attractions.tip: Arrive 90 minutes before sunset and bring insect repellent; the hilltop mosquitoes are fierce but the clearing empties quickly after dark when locals leave.

attractions.name: Swing Pier
attractions.description: A wooden swing suspended over turquoise waters at Sao Beach's southern edge offers an exhilarating photo moment where you literally swing out above the sea. Visit during late afternoon when golden light hits the water and crowds thin out for the best experience.
attractions.tip: Arrive after 4 PM when tour groups leave; the swing has better lighting and you'll avoid queues. Bring a waterproof phone case to capture shots safely.

attractions.name: Chùa Hùng Long - Đảo Phú Quốc
attractions.description: This ancient pagoda features intricate wooden carvings and sits perched overlooking the northern coastline with sweeping island views. The serene spiritual atmosphere combined with coastal panoramas makes it worth the trek to Phu Quoc's quieter northern reaches.
attractions.local_name: Chùa Hùng Long - Đảo Phú Quốc
attractions.tip: Visit early morning before tour groups arrive; the monks are often practicing meditation and the light on the coast is exceptional for photography.

attractions.name: Grand World Phu Quoc
attractions.description: This sprawling entertainment complex features glittering pavilions, themed zones, and vibrant street performances that pulse with energy after sunset. It's the premier spot for evening entertainment, combining shopping, dining, and people-watching in one integrated destination.
attractions.tip: Visit after 7 PM when the crowds peak and all attractions are fully lit; arrive early for dinner to secure beachfront restaurant tables before the rush.

attractions.name: Chợ đêm Grand World - Night Market Grand World Phú Quốc
attractions.description: This night market sprawls across Grand World with glowing vendor stalls selling street food, souvenirs, and local crafts until late evening. The perfect place to experience Phú Quốc's casual nightlife while sampling fresh seafood and tropical treats at local prices.
attractions.tip: Arrive after 8 PM when the crowd peaks and food stalls fully open their grills—prices don't change but selection and atmosphere are best then.

attractions.name: VinWonders Phú Quốc
attractions.description: This sprawling amusement park combines thrilling rides with lush tropical gardens and water attractions overlooking Phú Quốc's coastline. It's the perfect escape for families seeking adventure and entertainment without leaving the island.
attractions.tip: Visit on weekday afternoons to avoid weekend crowds; the park stays open late, so arrive around 3 PM for shorter queues and cooler evening rides.

attractions.name: Vinpearl Safari Phú Quốc
attractions.description: Open zoo & conservation park with a variety of rare native species & exotic animals.

attractions.name: Eco Lagoon
attractions.description: Crystal-clear lagoon waters surrounded by mangrove forests create a serene escape from Phu Quoc's busier beaches. Kayaking through narrow waterways reveals hidden coves and abundant birdlife, offering both relaxation and gentle exploration.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning before tour groups arrive to experience the lagoon's wildlife—herons and kingfishers are most active at dawn.

attractions.name: Sunset Bay Restaurant
attractions.description: Watch the sun sink into the Gulf of Thailand while seated at tables perched above Phu Quoc's shoreline, with fresh seafood and cool cocktails in hand. The combination of unobstructed western views and quality dining makes this the island's premier spot for golden hour.
attractions.tip: Arrive 90 minutes before sunset and order the grilled fish with salt crust—it takes time but pairs perfectly with the slow-changing light show overhead.

attractions.name: Nhà Trên Biển - Joy Adventures - Restaurant & Boat to Starfish Beach
attractions.description: This waterfront restaurant combines fresh seafood dining with boat access to the pristine Starfish Beach, where you can wade through shallow waters teeming with starfish. The dual experience of quality cuisine and direct beach exploration makes it the perfect half-day coastal stop.
attractions.local_name: Nhà Trên Biển - Joy Adventures - Nhà Hàng & Tàu đến Bãi Sao
attractions.tip: Arrive during low tide in early morning for the clearest starfish viewing and fewer tour groups competing for photos.

attractions.name: Thuy Long Thanh Mau
attractions.description: This cultural landmark features traditional Vietnamese architecture and artifacts that tell the story of Phu Quoc's heritage through carefully curated exhibits. Visit to experience authentic local history and capture Instagram-worthy moments amid preserved historical elements.
attractions.tip: Arrive early morning before tour groups to enjoy peaceful exploration and better natural lighting for photography throughout the site.

attractions.name: Vinwonders Fountain
attractions.description: This elaborate fountain complex features synchronized water jets, LED lighting, and theatrical performances that transform nightly into a mesmerizing spectacle. It's the perfect photo opportunity and evening entertainment hub within Vinwonders Grand World theme park.
attractions.tip: Visit during the evening light show performances for the best Instagram shots, and arrive 15 minutes early to secure prime viewing spots near the fountain's edge.

attractions.name: Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc
attractions.description: This sprawling theme park features thrilling roller coasters, water attractions, and interactive zones across meticulously landscaped grounds. The combination of rides, entertainment shows, and scenic island views makes it an all-day escape for families seeking varied amusement.
attractions.tip: Visit on weekday mornings to dodge weekend crowds; queue times drop significantly before 11 AM, giving you more ride time.

attractions.name: Quảng trường VinWonders
attractions.description: This central plaza in VinWonders Phú Quốc features colorful themed zones, interactive fountains, and immersive entertainment installations that blend modern design with Vietnamese cultural elements. It's the perfect gathering spot to experience the park's energy before exploring individual attractions.
attractions.tip: Visit during the evening water fountain shows (typically 7-8 PM) when crowds thin out and lighting transforms the plaza into a photographer's paradise.

attractions.name: Mysterious Viking Village
attractions.description: This themed village recreates a Nordic settlement with Viking-inspired architecture, interactive exhibits, and adventure activities set within the VinWonders Grand World complex. Perfect for families seeking theatrical entertainment blended with outdoor exploration and photo opportunities.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning before crowds arrive to enjoy the Viking shows and activities without long queues, and ask staff about behind-the-scenes photo spots near the wooden structures.

attractions.name: Đi thuyền Venice (Water Taxi) - Grand World Phú Quốc
attractions.description: Glide through Venice-inspired canals on traditional gondolas, weaving past charming European-style architecture and lantern-lit bridges in this elaborate theme park setting. The gentle waterway offers perfect photo opportunities and a uniquely kitsch escape from tropical beaches.
attractions.local_name: Đi thuyền Venice (Water Taxi) - Grand World Phú Quốc
attractions.tip: Visit during late afternoon when golden light hits the canal facades and crowds thin out before evening entertainment shows start.

attractions.name: Lâu đài huyền bí Vinwonders Castle
attractions.description: This fairy-tale castle features elaborate Gothic architecture, intricate stone carvings, and themed rooms that transport visitors into storybook worlds. The interactive exhibits and photo-worthy corners make it perfect for those seeking Instagram-worthy moments with a touch of European fantasy.
attractions.local_name: Lâu đài huyền bí Vinwonders Castle
attractions.tip: Visit on weekday mornings to avoid crowds and get the best natural lighting for photography inside the castle's ornate chambers.

attractions.name: Quảng trường biển Grand World
attractions.description: This sprawling waterfront plaza features pristine white sand beaches, modern architecture, and direct access to Phú Quốc's clearest waters with vibrant coral views just offshore. Come here to experience Vietnam's newest coastal destination where shopping, dining, and beach leisure merge seamlessly in one developed hub.
attractions.tip: Visit during late afternoon when crowds thin out and the golden light is perfect for photos, plus restaurants offer happy hour specials from 4-6 PM.

attractions.name: Vin Grand World
attractions.description: This sprawling entertainment complex features themed zones with attractions ranging from water parks to gaming arcades, all designed for Instagram-worthy moments at every turn. It's the ideal destination for families and groups seeking full-day entertainment with diverse activities under one roof.
attractions.tip: Visit on weekday afternoons to avoid weekend crowds, and grab tickets online beforehand to skip queues during peak hours.

attractions.name: Grand World Food Court
attractions.description: This sprawling food court in VinWonders Grand World showcases Vietnam's regional cuisines under one modern roof, from pho to bánh mì to fresh seafood specialties. Come hungry to explore dozens of stalls offering authentic flavors at reasonable prices while soaking in the lively atmosphere.
attractions.tip: Visit during lunch hours (11am-1pm) to catch vendors at peak freshness before ingredients run out, and grab a table on the upper level for people-watching.

attractions.name: Vinpearl Land Phú Quốc
attractions.description: This island theme park combines thrilling rides with tropical gardens and a cable car offering panoramic views over Phú Quốc's coastline. It's the ideal full-day escape for families seeking entertainment and natural scenery without leaving the island.
attractions.tip: Visit on weekdays to avoid crowds, and arrive early to tackle major rides before afternoon heat peaks. The cable car ride at sunset offers the best photography light.

attractions.name: Tinh Hoa Vietnam Quintessence of Vietnam Sân khấu thực cảnh Tinh hoa Việt Nam
attractions.description: This open-air theater showcases Vietnam's regional cultures through live performances featuring traditional music, dance, and elaborate costumes from across the country. Experience authentic Vietnamese heritage brought to life through dynamic stagecraft and immersive storytelling that captures centuries of tradition.
attractions.local_name: Sân khấu thực cảnh Tinh hoa Việt Nam
attractions.tip: Arrive 20 minutes early to secure optimal seating on the side sections, which offer better views of the intricate stage design and performer details than center seats.

attractions.name: Mê cung Gương + Căn Nhà Ma Grand World Phú Quốc
attractions.description: Navigate through reflective mirror mazes where distorted reflections create disorienting illusions, then explore a haunted house with interactive scares and special effects. The combination of psychological puzzles and adrenaline thrills offers entertainment rarely found elsewhere on the island.
attractions.local_name: Mê cung Gương + Căn Nhà Ma Grand World Phú Quốc
attractions.tip: Visit the mirror maze first when your eyes are fresh—the optical illusions are more effective before fatigue sets in. The haunted house hits harder in late evening when fewer crowds mean personalized scares.

attractions.name: Colors of Venice
attractions.description: This Venice-inspired theme park features vibrant canal-side architecture, colorful buildings, and European-style piazzas recreated in Phú Quốc. It's perfect for photography and leisurely wandering through whimsical Venetian streets without leaving Vietnam.
attractions.tip: Visit during late afternoon when golden hour light hits the colorful facades—locals know this timing creates the best Instagram shots before crowds peak at sunset.

attractions.name: Tháp Đồng hồ
attractions.description: This iconic clock tower stands as the centerpiece of Vinwonders Grand World, offering panoramic views of Phú Quốc's coastline and surrounding development from its observation deck. The best reason to visit is capturing Instagram-worthy sunset shots with the island sprawling beneath you.
attractions.tip: Visit during late afternoon when tour groups clear out, allowing you to explore the observation levels without crowds and catch golden hour lighting for photos.

attractions.name: Bamboo Legend
attractions.description: This immersive attraction showcases traditional bamboo craftsmanship through intricate sculptures and architectural displays carved entirely from bamboo. Experience hands-on workshops where you can learn ancestral techniques while admiring the artistry of Vietnam's most skilled bamboo artisans.
attractions.tip: Visit during weekday mornings to avoid weekend crowds and secure a spot in the craftsman workshops before they fill up.

attractions.name: Công viên Nghệ thuật Đương đại Urban Park - Grand World
attractions.description: This contemporary art park blends outdoor sculptures, interactive installations, and manicured green spaces within Grand World's entertainment complex. Perfect for capturing Instagram moments while experiencing Phú Quốc's modern creative scene alongside family-friendly activities.
attractions.local_name: Công viên Nghệ thuật Đương đại Urban Park - Grand World
attractions.tip: Visit during late afternoon when golden light hits the installations best and crowds thin out; the park transforms into a quieter, more photogenic space.

attractions.name: Công Viên Nước - Vinpearl Phú Quốc
attractions.description: This water park features wave pools, high-speed slides, and lazy rivers set against Phú Quốc's tropical backdrop with direct beach access. Come here for full-day thrills without leaving the island, combining water adventures with on-site dining and entertainment.
attractions.local_name: Công Viên Nước - Vinpearl Phú Quốc
attractions.tip: Visit on weekdays to avoid weekend crowds from Saigon day-trippers; entry prices drop and queues for slides decrease significantly.

attractions.name: Thom Beach Bar
attractions.description: This beachfront bar sits directly on Sao Beach's pristine white sand, where sunset cocktails pair with unobstructed sea views and a relaxed island atmosphere. Come for the golden hour light and casual vibe that captures why Phu Quoc's southern coast attracts travelers seeking laid-back beach culture.
attractions.tip: Arrive before 5pm to secure a prime beachfront spot on the sand; happy hour pricing typically runs 4-6pm, making sunset drinks more budget-friendly.

attractions.name: Phu Quoc Bee Farm
attractions.description: Walk through golden honeycomb displays while learning how local beekeepers harvest Phu Quoc's famous jungle honey using traditional methods. This working farm offers hands-on interaction with bees and a chance to taste raw honey directly from the source.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning when bees are less active and you'll get fresher honey samples. Bring cash—many local beekeepers offer better prices for direct purchases.

attractions.name: Rory's Beach Bar
attractions.description: This beachfront bar combines laid-back coastal vibes with carefully curated cocktails and fresh seafood right on Long Beach's golden sand. Perfect for catching sunset while mingling with travelers and locals in one of Phu Quoc's most photogenic beach settings.
attractions.tip: Arrive around 4pm to secure a prime sunset spot before the evening rush, and ask the bartenders for their house specials rather than the standard menu.

attractions.name: Phu Quoc National Park
attractions.description: Massive UNESCO Biosphere Reserve with evergreen forest, flora & fauna & unique oceanic species.

attractions.name: Fairy Waterfall
attractions.description: Cascading tiers of emerald pools nestle within lush jungle canopy, creating natural slides where visitors glide into crystalline waters. This easily accessible waterfall offers a refreshing escape from beach crowds with opportunities for swimming and photo composition.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning before tour groups arrive; the pools are calmest and light filtering through the canopy creates the best photography conditions.

attractions.name: Tiên Sơn Đỉnh
attractions.description: This clifftop viewpoint rewards the climb with panoramic vistas over Phú Quốc's coastline, where turquoise waters meet dense jungle canopy. Visit at golden hour when soft light transforms the landscape into a photographer's paradise.
attractions.tip: Arrive 30 minutes before sunset and stay after dark—the lack of light pollution makes this one of Phú Quốc's best spots for stargazing above the ocean.

attractions.name: Ham Ninh fishing town
attractions.description: Watch wooden fishing boats unload the morning catch while locals sort nets and ice down fresh seafood at this working harbor. Experience authentic coastal village life where fishermen still use traditional methods and seafood restaurants serve your meal minutes after it arrives.
attractions.tip: Visit at dawn (5-6am) when fishing boats return with the night's catch—you'll see the real energy and can negotiate fresh fish directly from boats before tourist crowds arrive.

attractions.name: Hidden Garden Phu Quoc
attractions.description: Tucked away in northern Phu Quoc's jungle canopy, this intimate botanical garden reveals rare orchids, cascading water features, and forest pathways that feel worlds away from crowded beaches. Perfect for nature lovers seeking genuine encounters with Vietnamese flora in its most natural state.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning when mist lingers and wildlife is active; local guides know which orchid species bloom seasonally and can point out endemic plants you'd miss alone.

attractions.name: Suoi Tranh Waterfall
attractions.description: A multi-tiered waterfall hidden within Phu Quoc's northern jungle, with crystalline pools perfect for swimming beneath cascading water. The trek through dense forest rewards visitors with an unspoiled natural escape far from the island's beach crowds.
attractions.tip: Arrive early morning before tour groups, and bring reef shoes for slippery rocks—locals know the pool near the base stays coldest and clearest in the first hours.

attractions.name: Khu du lịch Suối Tranh
attractions.description: A cascading waterfall hidden within Phu Quoc's northern jungle, where emerald pools invite swimmers beneath towering limestone cliffs. The pristine natural setting offers rare solitude compared to crowded coastal beaches, making it perfect for those seeking authentic jungle immersion.
attractions.tip: Visit early morning before 8am to have the pools almost entirely to yourself and capture photos without crowds reflected in the water.

attractions.name: Thác Đá Ngọn - Phú Quốc
attractions.description: This hidden waterfall cascades over smooth granite rocks into crystal-clear pools, creating natural rock formations perfect for wading and photography. The serene jungle setting offers an authentic escape from crowded beaches without requiring a full-day trek.
attractions.tip: Arrive early morning before tour groups to have the pools nearly to yourself, and wear water shoes for better grip on the slippery rocks.

food.name: Hải sản Động Tôm Hùm - Lobster Cave seafood
food.where: 1 Đường Bạch Đằng, phường, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92500, Vietnam
food.tip: Order the fresh lobster grilled with garlic butter. Best visited in evening when the night market is busiest and seafood is freshest.

food.name: Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem
food.where: 1a Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Khu 1, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Order the French seafood specialties fresh from Phu Quoc waters. Best visited during evening hours for ambiance.
food.local_name: Aigue-Marine French Bistro by Hidden Gem

food.name: Chuồn Chuồn Bistro & Bar
food.where: Thửa đất 60, Tờ bản đồ 122, đặc khu, Tổ 3 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, kp7, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92500, Vietnam
food.tip: Try their fresh seafood grilled specialties during sunset hours for best ambiance and quality. Perfect for evening drinks.

food.name: Si’s Crab House
food.where: 6X85+PXH, 26 Đường Nguyễn Trãi, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam

food.name: Ann Cafe & Brunch Phu Quoc ( Coffee Shop at Duong Dong Night Market )
food.where: 7 Đường Lê Thị Hồng Gấm, Khu 1, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92500, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit during sunset hours for the best atmosphere at the night market. Try their signature Vietnamese coffee with condensed milk.

food.name: Zyzu Kafé
food.where: Lối lên, 69 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit during sunset for best ambiance overlooking Duong Dong Town. Try their signature Vietnamese coffee with condensed milk.

food.name: ANBA COFFEE
food.where: 131 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit during sunset for prime people-watching views of Duong Dong Night Market. Try their signature Vietnamese iced coffee.

food.name: GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books
food.where: 267 TL47, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang 920000, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit during sunset for riverside views with your coffee. Try their local Phú Quốc coffee blend and relax among books.
food.local_name: GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books

food.name: CHAO Cafe & Local Taste
food.where: 118/2/1/1 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Khu Phố 7, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Try their local Phu Quoc specialties during lunch hours when ingredients are freshest. Perfect spot near the night market.

food.name: CHILL COFFEE & TEA
food.where: 72 Đường Bạch Đằng, Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit during sunset for the best atmosphere. Try their signature iced coffee with local condensed milk.

food.name: Dương Đông Night Market
food.where: 128 Đường Bạch Đằng, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit after 6 PM when stalls open. Try grilled seafood and bánh mì. Arrive early for best selection before crowds.

food.name: PHU QUOC CENTRE
food.where: 1 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92506, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit during evening hours to experience the night market atmosphere. Try fresh seafood grilled at market stalls for authentic local flavors.

food.name: Chợ đêm Phú Quốc
food.where: 54 Đường Nguyễn Trãi, Khu 1, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit after 6 PM for fresh seafood grilled at stalls. Try the grilled squid and fish cakes from local vendors.

food.name: Bach Dang Night Market
food.where: 6X96+827, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit after 6 PM when stalls open. Try grilled seafood and bánh mì. Cash only at most vendors.

food.name: LOCA - Night Market
food.where: 11 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Go after 7 PM when the night market buzzes with locals. Try the grilled seafood skewers and fresh spring rolls.

food.name: Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc
food.where: 6XC5+7MW, Chợ Đường Ngô Quyền, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit after sunset for the best atmosphere. Try fresh grilled seafood and local specialties at vendor stalls throughout the market.

food.name: Duong Dong Town
food.where: 54 Hùng Vương, Khu phố 7, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit after sunset for the best night market atmosphere. Try fresh grilled seafood and local specialties from multiple stalls.

food.where: 79 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92500, Vietnam
food.tip: Try the grilled seafood platter at sunset. Best visited during evening hours when the night market atmosphere peaks.
food.local_name: Nhà hàng Nét Việt Phú Quốc

food.name: Bếp An Restaurant
food.where: 84 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Dương Tơ, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Try the grilled seafood platters during evening hours when fresh catches arrive at the night market.

food.name: The Waterfront Restaurant
food.where: 66G Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, Kiên Giang 920000, Vietnam
food.tip: Fresh seafood grilled right by the waterfront at sunset. Order the local catch of the day for best quality and flavor.

food.name: Aloha Beach Bar
food.where: 68 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92000, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit at sunset for stunning ocean views and happy hour cocktails. Try their signature tropical drinks while watching the beach.

food.name: OCSEN Beach Bar & Club
food.where: Hẻm 124 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Dương Tơ, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92000, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit at sunset for the best atmosphere and cocktails with ocean views. Happy hour deals available early evening.

food.name: AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar Phu Quoc
food.where: Happy Bear Hostel, 179 30/4, Street, Phú Quốc, An Giang 29500, Vietnam
food.tip: Try their fresh seafood pasta during sunset hours for the best beach views and optimal dining atmosphere.
food.local_name: AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar Phú Quốc

food.name: LAYLOW Phu Quoc
food.where: Sao Mai Rd, Duong Dong, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit at sunset for stunning beach views. Try their signature cocktails made with local tropical fruits.

food.name: PHU QUOC NIGHT MARKET & LOCAL FOOD
food.where: Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Khu 1, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92500, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit after sunset for the best atmosphere. Try fresh seafood grilled at market stalls and local specialties like fish cake soup.
food.local_name: PHU QUOC NIGHT MARKET & LOCAL FOOD

food.name: The Spice House Restaurant at Cassia Cottage
food.where: KP7 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Street, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92000, Vietnam
food.tip: Order their signature spiced seafood dishes at sunset. Best experienced during golden hour for atmospheric dining.

food.name: Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant
food.where: 100C/2 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Str, Phú Quốc, Kiên Giang 92500, Vietnam
food.tip: Arrive before sunset for prime seating with ocean views. Fresh seafood grilled daily; try the local catch of the day.

food.name: Hạt Điền Espresso Bar
food.where: 100 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Dương Tơ, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Try their signature Vietnamese coffee with condensed milk. Best visited early morning for freshly roasted beans and quieter atmosphere.

food.name: Phu Quoc Street Food Tour - Eat with Locals, Drink with Locals
food.where: 94 Nguyễn Trung Trực, TT. Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92506, Vietnam
food.tip: Go at dusk to experience the best street food scene with locals. Try the grilled fish and fresh seafood specialties.
food.local_name: Phú Quốc Street Food Tour - Ăn với Người Dân Địa Phương, Uống với Người Dân Địa Phương

food.name: Local Eatery
food.where: 5XV8+W8F, Dương Tơ, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Try the fresh seafood grilled daily. Best visited at sunset for ocean views and cooler evening temperatures.

food.name: THE PEAK PHU QUOC
food.where: Group 2, Quarter 1 Ward, Duong Dong, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92507, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit at sunset for stunning views over Phu Quoc. Order their signature cocktails made with local ingredients.

food.name: Bơ restaurant & coffee
food.where: 100c Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Dương Đông, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92500, Vietnam
food.tip: Try their butter-based dishes during lunch hours for the freshest ingredients. Great coffee pairs perfectly with local pastries.

food.name: Rice Market - Regent Phu Quoc
food.where: Bãi Trường, Dương Tơ, Phú Quốc, An Giang 92509, Vietnam
food.tip: Try the fresh seafood grilled over charcoal at dusk when the night market comes alive with energy and local crowds.

food.name: SEN Restaurant
food.where: Sonasea Villas & Resort, Đường Bào, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Try the grilled seafood platters at sunset. Peak hours are 6-8 PM; arrive early to secure waterfront seating.

food.name: CÁI MÂM BISTRO
food.where: P27 Chợ đêm Vuifest - Sunset Town, An Thới, Phú Quốc, An Giang 91000, Vietnam
food.tip: Try their fresh seafood dishes at sunset. Peak hours are 6-8 PM. Ask for daily specials not on menu.

food.name: 39k Seafood &BBQ
food.where: Lô 03, 05 Chợ đêm bãi trường, Dương Tơ, Phú Quốc, An Giang, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit during evening hours for the freshest seafood selection. The grilled fish and shrimp are exceptional. Arrive early to secure seating.

food.name: Chillin Coffee Corner
food.where: Khu THDL Sonaseas, Tổ 5 Ấp, Đường Bào, Phú Quốc, An Giang 920000, Vietnam
food.tip: Visit early morning for freshly brewed Vietnamese coffee and fewer crowds. Their iced ca phe sua da is exceptional.
